holdings.infoBox: SPCT is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 3.32%, Apple at 3.08%, Broadcom at 3.06%, Eli Lilly and Company at 2.89%, and Amazon.com at 2.87%.

overview.description: The Liberty One Spectrum ETF (SPCT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund provides exposure to US companies from a broad spectrum of sectors. The actively managed ETF focuses on dividend-paying large-cap companies. SPCT was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Liberty One.
